item.name: Al-iklil Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near your Al-iklil will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Al-iklil
mount.action: Summon forth Al-iklil, a stylish hovering craft designed to carry up to two riders. Any more and it may not heed you.
mount.description: A gift from Fran to the Bozjan Resistance, this craft hovers by the power of skystones, crystals that allow entire masses of land to levitate. Its name is said to be derived from an ancient Ivalician word meaning “crown.”
mount.tooltip:
I'm only here to see how the
story unfolds. Any self-respecting
leading man would do the same.
- Debonair Sky Pirate
